summary: Made a surgical exit-polish pass to align the chapter's closing cleanup beat more closely with Chapter 7's opening aftermath while preserving all scene beats, voice, and causality. The opening was left unchanged because it already uses a different structural entry from the visible adjacent opening in the boundary context.
edits: Specified that cleanup work begins on the starboard lane.
Added a splinter-raising scrubbing image to bridge into the next chapter's opening atmosphere.
Tightened the final sentence so Marrow Market's work registers as Iven's silver buying movement at social cost.
